loan_requestment_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'DD MONTH YYYY' ) as requestment_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as memname , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) as id_card , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card_date) as id_card_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card_enddate) as id_card_enddate , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, '0') as telephone ,substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),1,2) as age_life_text_year ,substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),7,2) as age_life_text_month ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as position_long , sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_line(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, '1') as address_home , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount ) as salary_amount_thai , to_snumber(sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount) as period_payment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount ) as period_payment_amount_thai , pka_lon_intsrv.fp_intrate_table_loantype( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) * 100 as lon_int_rate , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount ) || 'งวด' as loan_installment_amount_thai , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ) as loan_request_amount_thai , sc_lon_m_loan_request.last_payment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_loan_request.last_payment_amount ) as last_payment_amount_thai , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type
,(select sc_hr_off_member.official_type from sc_hr_off_member where sc_hr_off_member.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as official_type
,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description ,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.work_telephone from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as work_telephone ,(select pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_member_work_info.work_province_code) from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as work_province_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate, 'DD/MM/YYYY') as book_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate, 'DD MONTH YYYY') as book_date_th ,pka_insure_paysrv.fp_get_insure_approve (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as insurance_pay --ค่าเบี้ยประกัน
--หักบัญชีเงินฝาก ,(select sc_lon_m_req_fee.deposit_account_no from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no) as deposit_account_no --เลขบัญชี(บัญชีเงินฝาก) ,(select sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no) as amount --จำนวนเงิน(บัญชีเงินฝาก) ,to_snumber(sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.paid_amount) as paid_amount --เงินรับจริง ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.paid_amount)as paid_amount_thai
--หุ้น ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock --มูลค่าหุ้น ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount --อัตราหุ้น
--ที่อยู่ ,sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no ,sc_mem_m_member_address.soi ,sc_mem_m_member_address.road ,sc_mem_m_member_address.moo ,pka_com_function.fp_get_sub_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol) as tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code,sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code) as district_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code) as province_name ,sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode
--หุ้นค้ำ ,(select collateral_type_code from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code = '02') as share_coll
--เงินฝากค้ำ ,(select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code ='03') as dep_coll_no ,(select collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code ='03') as dep_coll_name ,nvl((select req_amount from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code ='03'),0) as dep_coll_amount
--จำนองอสังหาริมทรัพย์ ,(select collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code ='04') as land_coll_name
--ชื่อคนค้ำประกัน ,(select collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='1' ) as coll_name_1 ,(select collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='2' ) as coll_name_2 ,(select collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='3' ) as coll_name_3 ,(select collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='4' ) as coll_name_4 ,(select collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='5' ) as coll_name_5 ,(select collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='6' ) as coll_name_6 ,(select collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='7' ) as coll_name_7
--ทะเบียนคนค้ำ ,(select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='1' ) as coll_no_1 ,(select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='2' ) as coll_no_2 ,(select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='3' ) as coll_no_3 ,(select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='4' ) as coll_no_4 ,(select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='5' ) as coll_no_5 ,(select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='6' ) as coll_no_6 ,(select ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='7' ) as coll_no_7
--เบอร์คนค้ำ ,(select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no, '0') from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='1' ) as tel_coll_1 ,(select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no, '0') from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='2' ) as tel_coll_2 ,(select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no, '0') from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='3' ) as tel_coll_3 ,(select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no, '0') from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='4' ) as tel_coll_4 ,(select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no, '0') from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='5' ) as tel_coll_5 ,(select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no, '0') from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='6' ) as tel_coll_6 ,(select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no, '0') from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and collateral_type_code in('01','02') and seq_no ='7' ) as tel_coll_7
--ตำแหน่งคนค้ำ ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long from sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code in('01','02') and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='1' ) as position_coll_1 ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long from sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code in('01','02') and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='2' ) as position_coll_2 ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long from sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code in('01','02') and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='3' ) as position_coll_3 ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long from sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code in('01','02') and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='4' ) as position_coll_4 ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long from sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code in('01','02') and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='5' ) as position_coll_5 ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long from sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code in('01','02') and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='6' ) as position_coll_6 ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long from sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code in('01','02') and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='7' ) as position_coll_7
--สังกัดคนค้ำ ,(SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) FROM sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='1' ) as coll_group_name1 ,(SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) FROM sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='2' ) as coll_group_name2 ,(SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) FROM sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='3' ) as coll_group_name3 ,(SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) FROM sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='4' ) as coll_group_name4 ,(SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) FROM sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='5' ) as coll_group_name5 ,(SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) FROM sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='6' ) as coll_group_name6 ,(SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) FROM sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ='7' ) as coll_group_name7
from sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid , si_security_user , sc_cnt_m_coop , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_member_address
where sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id = si_security_user.user_id and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type in ('ปค','ปก') and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type ='0'
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = '13816' --AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ='666600450'

r_mwa_req_form_loan_rest_nest.sql: select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no --เลขสัญญา สามัญ ,sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no --เลขสัญญาเก่า ,sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_of_loan --หนี้คงเหลือ ,sc_lon_m_loan_history.monthly_pay_i --ดอกเบี้ย ,sc_lon_m_loan_history.last_period --งวด ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code from sc_lon_m_loan_history ,sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target ='1' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = {0}
